title: Realistic bells sounds!
description: This resource pack adds ultra-realistic bell sounds, almost identical to real-life ones, for a truly immersive Minecraft experience!...
body:
Description:
Immerse yourself in a realistic sound experience with the Ultra realistic bells sounds pack!. Every bell, chime, and full bell sequence has been recreated with exceptional realism, faithfully capturing the resonance and echo of a real-world bell tower.

Key Features:

Ultra-realistic sounds for all in-game bells.

Detailed chimes and full bell sequences, with natural variations depending on distance and context.

Compatible with all modern versions of Minecraft. (from 1.9 to 1.21.10)

Lightweight and optimized to avoid affecting game performance.

Why Install This Pack?
Perfect for enhancing the immersion of your villages, churches, or personal builds. Every chime and bell sequence adds a striking level of realism to your Minecraft world.

Example usage with Redstone and Command Blocks:
To make bells automatically ring with a Redstone clock, use the command:

/playsound bell:audioX master @p ~ ~ ~ [distance] [pitch]

Details:

X: Replace with the number of the sound you want to play (1, 2, 3, 4…).

audio1 and audio2 → designed for big bells.

audio3 and audio4 → designed for smaller bells.

@p: Targets the nearest player.

~ ~ ~: Plays the sound at the coordinates of the command block.

[distance]: Maximum distance the sound can be heard (e.g., 100).

[pitch]: Adjusts the pitch (note) of the sound:

Values less than 1.0 → lower pitch (deeper sound).

Values greater than 1.0 → higher pitch (sharper sound).

Example: 0.90 = slightly lower, 1.0 = normal, 1.2 = slightly higher.
